title: QUIC RFC 9000 Connection-ID Retransmission Reliability Work Item
summary: Carve direct positive and negative proof links for send-runtime retransmission of packets carrying NEW_CONNECTION_ID and RETIRE_CONNECTION_ID payloads without claiming broader connection-ID lifecycle behavior.
planned_changes:
- Add focused architecture, work-item, and verification artifacts for the connection-ID retransmission proof.
- Link RFC 9000 Section 13.3 connection-ID repair requirements to the focused artifact set while preserving the broad RFC9000-0001 trace.
- Preserve the existing requirement-home tests that show loss queues repair and unrelated ACKs do not clear it.
- Preserve focused verification evidence under `artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-cid-retransmission-reliability/`.
verification_plan: Run the focused RFC 9000 connection-ID retransmission requirement-home tests, render/check the touched SpecTrace artifacts, verify reciprocal trace links for the focused artifact set, run `git diff --check`, and preserve evidence under `artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-cid-retransmission-reliability/`.
completion_notes: Completed as a proof-link closure over existing send-runtime retransmission behavior; no production behavior changed.
